loc_discipline.evidence: 12/25 source files exceed 300 LOC (48%). styles.css at 1967 LOC is 6.5× the limit. lib.rs at 602 LOC. vexil_master.py at 716 LOC.

validation_coverage.evidence: 0% of Tauri IPC commands have input validation (path sanitization, type guards, allowlists). Only markdown rendering path uses DOMPurify. send_signal validates neither pid nor signal.

secrets_hygiene.evidence: No hardcoded secrets found. No .env files. But CSP is null, no secret manager, no lint rule enforcing .env usage.
secrets_hygiene.rule: Score 2: Env + no secrets (missing lint + secret manager for score 3)

state_persistence.evidence: In-memory session state (lost on crash). localStorage for small UI prefs. File-based for history (read-only). No crash recovery, no idempotency keys, no session re-attach.

errors_retry_idempotency.evidence: Rust uses Result<T,String> consistently. JS has 10+ silent catch(_){} blocks. No retry logic. No structured error format. No idempotency.

testing_ci.evidence: No test framework. No CI. One bespoke structural smoke test (test_auto.cjs, 220 LOC) not wired to any gate.
